creator: henry@henryphan.com
text:
Created attachment 241670
Bump ruby-install version to 0.9.0.

Updates the ruby-install port to 0.9.0.

One thing to note: ruby-install dropped support for Rubinius in version 0.9.0 (see https://github.com/postmodern/ruby-install/issues/435), so I've updated the port's png-plist accordingly.
